heading: View Metrics in Charts
body:
The **Namespace Insights** page displays two charts
that each visualize a selected metric for up to five selected namespaces over the filtered time range.

By default, Atlas charts metrics for pinned namespaces and top namespaces with the highest total latency.
To choose which namespaces to chart, see [Select Namespaces to Chart](select-namespaces-to-chart). To find and pin namespaces, see [Manage Pinned Namespaces](manage-pinned-namespaces).

To select which metrics to visualize and filter by operation type:
